calendar.matters:
Petition For An Order Of Distribution Of Real Property And Attorneys Statutory Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order That Decedents Real Property Is An Asset Of Probate Estate And Not An Asset Of His Purported Trust
Off Calendar Aug-09-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert L. Ferris for petitioner Eileen Wong.

Mr. Ferris informed the Court that the trust document was missing schedules in addition to the signature page. He stated that he had contacted the notary used in related transactions, but the notary could give no confirmation of the execution of the trust as the notary's record book for that year had been stolen. He stated that all trust beneficiaries had waived any interest in the real property, and that no objectionn to the petition had been filed.The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not reported)
